AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: This app reports whether the device has root access (is rooted) and which root solution is present. Operational patterns: - Use 'checkRootStatus' to run a fresh root check and read the current state. - Use 'getLastRootCheck' to read the most recent check and its 'checkedAt' time without re-probing the device; prefer this to answer 'when was the last check?'. - Use 'requestRootAccess' only when the user wants to grant this app root access; it surfaces the superuser allow dialog and requires an on-device tap, so it is not fully hands-free. Constraints: - All functions are read-only with respect to the device's root state; none install, modify, or remove root.
